name: nyawa-mcp
description: Nyawa offline-first AI memory engine -- MCP integration for AI agents
author: Rezky Aulia Pratama

nyawa_store.description: Store a new memory with content, namespace, and type

input.type: string (optional, default: 'note') -- one of: decision, insight, procedure, fact, preference, context, note, event, reference

nyawa_recall.description: Semantic search across memories using hybrid search (vector + FTS5 + RRF)
nyawa_recall.output: ranked memory results with relevance scores

nyawa_stats.output: total memories, pinned count, namespaces, vector index size, entity graph

nyawa_forget.description: Soft-delete a memory by its ID

instructions: Nyawa MCP server communicates over stdio using JSON-RPC 2.0. Start the server with nyawa mcp <db>, send JSON-RPC request lines to stdin, and read responses from stdout. The protocol uses MCP 2025-03-26. Each line is a complete JSON-RPC request. Responses are line-delimited JSON. Always call initialize first, then tools/list to discover available tools.
